verse.name: v1
verse.lines: This is the day That the Lord has made I will rejoice and celebrate This is the day That the Lord has made I will rejoice I will rejoice and celebrate

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He goes before me He walks beside me He lives within me He's the lover of my soul He's my defender He's my provider His overflowing mercies Are brand new every day

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I will rejoice I will rejoice and celebrate I will rejoice I will rejoice I will rejoice Rejoice and celebrate
